name: Granite Speech 4.1 2B — Streaming Keyword-Biased on Gold-92
short_description: Per-clip predictions from Granite Speech 4.1 2B with keyword prompt injection under 32 kB PCM streaming simulation on all 93 gold-92 clips.
model_description: ibm-granite/granite-speech-4.1-2b, HuggingFace Transformers BF16, GPU inference, keyword prompt injection (31 domain terms)

files.description: Per-clip STT predictions under streaming simulation. Each line: clip_id, hypothesis, latency_seconds, num_chunks, audio_duration_seconds.
